task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met. The implementation correctly adds the mistral_instruct_v3 handler function with proper format (COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY), includes robust template auto-detection that distinguishes from Ministral 3 by checking for absence of [SYSTEM_PROMPT] and [AVAILABLE_TOOLS], has the required LOG_DBG call, and properly dispatches with (tmpl, params). The Jinja2 template in the test case correctly implements [INST]/[/INST] wrapping, system message prepending to first user turn, and </s> appending after assistant turns via eos_token. No existing handlers or header files are modified. The test case is comprehensive with expected outputs showing proper formatting.
